text.message: Red or blue if you get 7 and can stop oj from blowing me I owe you big time
that wouldnt even be smart, the spot is way more valuable for you than for me
Oj you are too well set up
i have to trade half my income to do anything
think we want black to get it
Sorry oj had to make a quick call there
But yeah whoever gets that is a huge advantage
you make a huge error and get rewarded black
Red once I build my settle you can have your wood
You can have my next two
great idea, just lets do a 2v1v1
Red me spending that wood to make the settle won’t slow down you getting your wood from me at all
Because I would have had to wait for an 8 anyway
Which now when it rolls will give me two to give to you
and now you dont even rob them
how do you not steal from black here
Scared from the plow from blue here
Will give you wood on my turn red
How does that work I’m confused
2 wood and any card for 1 of mine
careful with just feeding red everything here
hes in a pretty good spot
Not feeding I had to finish my end of the deal
My game was over if he didn’t do that for me
Sorry red can’t do with you
Dont worry he is full focused on me
I’d say blue is a problem now
Blue has two non knight devs
solo me while both of them have 2 devs
its actually pretty balanced at this point
black has road 2 knights played and open spot
I thought that road would stop you plowing me
how would i plow you lol
I thought that’s what you were trading for
they wouldnt rob their friend anyway
I’m about to lose road to blue
nah i got no city production
i wont get anywhere without ore
and both of you were happily helping
If I can’t get roads it’s game over
I can feed brick if you show your hand
I can give back the wood
I think we still lose here
black you fumbled this game so hard lol
at least try to disguise your collusion
Oj what are you even on about
blue you robbed me as well
when it was obviously red or black
Its a balanced game all this crying is embarassing
Red you can plow his road
I can’t help you with cards cos it’s too Risky
